---
title: "PSY 8712 Week 8 Project"
author: "Kyrene"
date: "2026-03-22"
output: 
   html_document:
     theme:
        bootswatch: cosmo
        fg: "#0000FF"
        bg: "#FFFFFF"
     toc: true
     toc_float: true
     df_print: paged
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

# Reproducible Image and Online Resources
An image of this project as of date can be accessed by clicking this link.
